question_intent: total revenue from sales of books by authors with contracts and 100% royalty

plan.question_intent: total revenue from sales of books by authors with contracts and 100% royalty
plan.detail_query:
SELECT leaf_1.title_id, leaf_1.title, leaf_1.au_id, leaf_1.au_lname, leaf_1.au_fname, leaf_1.qty, leaf_1.price, leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price AS revenue
FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, sales.qty, titles.price
FROM titles
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (titleauthor.royaltyper = 100)) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, sales.qty, titles.price
blocks.notes: returns title_id, title, author_id, author last name, author first name, quantity sold, and price for each book sold by authors with contracts and 100% royalty

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, sales.qty, titles.price
FROM titles
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (titleauthor.royaltyper = 100)) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

preview.title: Prolonged Data Deprivation: Four Case Studies

steps.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, sales.qty, titles.price
FROM titles
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
WHERE (authors.contract = 1) AND (titleauthor.royaltyper = 100)) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT SUM(leaf_1.qty * leaf_1.price) AS total_contract_revenue
FROM (SELECT titles.title_id, titles.title, authors.au_id, authors.au_lname, authors.au_fname, sales.qty, titles.price
FROM titles
JOIN publishers ON titles.pub_id = publishers.pub_id
JOIN titleauthor ON titles.title_id = titleauthor.title_id
JOIN authors ON titleauthor.au_id = authors.au_id
JOIN sales ON titles.title_id = sales.title_id
WHERE (publishers.pub_name = 'Algodata Infosystems') AND (authors.contract = 1) AND (titleauthor.royaltyper = 100)) AS leaf_1

SELECT SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue
FROM (SELECT t.title_id, t.title, t.price, s.qty, ta.royaltyper, (t.price * s.qty * ta.royaltyper / 100) AS revenue
FROM titles AS t
JOIN sales AS s ON t.title_id = s.title_id
JOIN titleauthor AS ta ON t.title_id = ta.title_id
JOIN publishers AS p ON t.pub_id = p.pub_id
WHERE (p.pub_id = 1389) AND (p.state = 'CA')) AS leaf_1

question: What is the total revenue generated from all book sales where the author is under a full contract and receives 100% of the royalties?
